steps.title: Identify the contributions to the total
steps.content:
The drill sheet is worth 90 points total. The points come from:
  • $x$ questions worth 2 points each, totaling $2x$ points
  • $y$ questions worth 5 points each, totaling $5y$ points

steps.title: Set up the equation for the total
steps.content:
Since the total must be 90 points:
$$2x + 5y = 90$$
That matches Choice D — $2x+5y=90$.
